args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm sending you a summary of our recent client meeting held on May 5, 2024.

During the meeting, we discussed your requirements for the new project, agreed on the project timeline and key milestones, and reviewed the initial design concepts with your feedback.

The next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024, where we will continue our discussions and review the progress made on the project.

Please find the detailed meeting minutes attached to this email for your reference.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
